Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Beniamino Green. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

  • Etienne Bacher. Contributor.

  • The authors of the dependency Rust crates. Contributor, copyright holder.
    see inst/AUTHORS file for details

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Green B (2025). zoomerjoin: Superlatively Fast Fuzzy Joins. R package version 0.2.1, https://beniamino.org/zoomerjoin/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {zoomerjoin: Superlatively Fast Fuzzy Joins},
  author = {Beniamino Green},
  year = {2025},
  note = {R package version 0.2.1},
  url = {https://beniamino.org/zoomerjoin/},
}
